summary: Iteration 32 - Comprehensive testing of Printer Management (SNMP) feature. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All printer page elements verified working. Features tested: Printer Dashboard API, List Printers API, Printer Detail API, Seed Demo API, Process Poll API (no auth), Frontend stats cards, low toner alerts, expandable printer cards, toner bars with colors, sidebar navigation.

issues: Minor: Chart width warning in console when page first loads (recharts library issue, not blocking)

printer_dashboard_api: GET /api/printers/dashboard/{client_id} - Returns correct structure (total, online, offline, low_toner_count, total_pages, printers)
Dashboard has demo data (4 printers seeded)
Low toner alerts returned correctly (>=3 alerts for supplies <=15%)
list_printers_api: GET /api/printers/{client_id} - Returns all printers for client
printer_detail_api: GET /api/printers/{client_id}/{device_ip} - Returns printer detail with supply_history
Supplies have correct color info (black, cyan, magenta, yellow)
process_poll_api: Detects toner color from name (Cyan Toner -> cyan, #00bcd4)
Returns 400 if client_id or device_ip missing
frontend_printers_page: Printers page accessible from sidebar 'Stampanti' under 'Monitoraggio'
Stats cards display: 7 Stampanti, 6 Online, 1 Offline, 4 Toner Basso, 266.6K Pagine Totali
Low toner alerts section 'AVVISI TONER BASSO' with colored levels (10%, 5%, 15%, 15%)
7 printer cards displayed (4 demo + 3 test printers)
Expandable printer cards show Consumabili, Vassoi Carta, Contatori sections
Toner bars with correct colors (black, cyan, magenta, yellow)
network_status_page: Device type select includes 'Stampante SNMP' option (value: printer)

critical_code_review_comments: Printer router properly registered in server.py (line 140: import, line 163: include_router)
Printer indexes created on startup (lines 241-244: printer_status, printer_history with TTL 90 days)
Process-poll endpoint correctly skips JWT auth for connector polling
Color detection works for black, cyan, magenta, yellow, blue toners
Level percentage calculated correctly from max_capacity and current_level
Low toner alerts auto-generated when level <= 15%
seed_data_creation: Demo printer data already seeded. Backend tests created 3 additional test printers (192.168.1.97, 192.168.1.98, 192.168.1.99) via process-poll endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified Printer Management feature: 1) Backend APIs all working - dashboard, list, detail, seed-demo, process-poll. 2) Process-poll endpoint works without JWT auth (for connector). 3) Frontend shows stats cards, low toner alerts, expandable printer cards with toner bars. 4) 'Stampante SNMP' option available in device type select on Network Status page. 5) Sidebar has 'Stampanti' nav item under 'Monitoraggio' group with Printer icon.

mocked_apis.firebase_push: Firebase Cloud Messaging (push notifications) is MOCKED

printer_dashboard.returns: total, online, offline, low_toner_count, low_toner[], errors[], total_pages, printers[]

list_printers.returns: Array of printers sorted by device_name

process_poll.features: Calculates level_pct, detects color, creates alerts for low toner

frontend_printers_page.components: Stats cards, Low toner alerts, Printer cards (expandable), Toner bars

device_type_option.location: Network Status page - Add device form
